lesson.menu_desc: Dialogue + small talk questions to break the ice with David -- weather, weekend and his trip to Sao Paulo -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 17 -- Small Talk That Works -- Breaking the Ice in English
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Maísa de Oliveira Santos | Aula 17 -- Small Talk That Works

listenings.text: Hi Maisa, this is David. I am here in Sao Paulo now. The flight was very long, and I am a little tired today. But the city is beautiful. The weather here is warm and sunny. In New York it is cold and rainy this week, so this is very nice for me. There was some traffic from the airport, but it was fine. My weekend was great. I visited a museum and I tried Brazilian coffee. By the way, I really like it. See you at the office. Thank you!

Hello, this is Sarah from the office. Let me tell you about my weekend. It was really nice and relaxing. On Saturday the weather was sunny, so I went to the park with a friend. On Sunday it was rainy, so I stayed home and watched a movie. I was a little tired, but it was a good weekend. By the way, have you been to the new coffee shop near the office? The coffee there is great. There is a lot of traffic in the morning, so come early. Have a nice day!

extra_audio.text: Hi David, welcome to Sao Paulo. How was your flight? What is the weather like in New York? By the way, have you been to Brazil before? See you at the office.
